mapper.select: SELECT cc.id AS classId, c.course_no AS courseNo, c.name AS courseName, cc.credit AS credit, c.type AS type, c.sub_type AS subType, t.name AS teacherName, cc.time_location_info AS timeLocationInfo, cc.capacity AS capacity, cc.stock AS stock FROM course_class cc JOIN course c ON cc.course_id = c.id JOIN teacher t ON cc.teacher_id = t.id

SELECT cc.id AS classId, c.course_no AS courseNo, c.name AS courseName, cc.credit AS credit, c.type AS type, c.sub_type AS subType, t.name AS teacherName, cc.time_location_info AS timeLocationInfo, cc.capacity AS capacity, cc.stock AS stock FROM course_class cc JOIN course c ON cc.course_id = c.id JOIN teacher t ON cc.teacher_id = t.id where cc.id = #{classId}
